196	
197	- Mode = bootstrap: log only, never block.
198	- Seed 30 curated patterns (shell injection, secret regexes, prod-resource names, destructive verbs).
199	- Success criteria: p95 evaluate latency <10ms; 100% of MCP actions logged through guardian.
200	
201	### Phase 2 вҖ” ML Guard (Weeks 3-4)
202	
203	Train logistic regression on 30 days of `fact_outcomes`; deploy weights via `ml_guard_models`.
204	
205	- Wire into evaluator behind rules.
206	- Mode = recommend: warn + return `suggested_action`.
207	- Reuse existing score-cache (LRU Map, 1000 entries, 5-min TTL).
208	- Success criteria: offline AUC > 0.80; p95 ML latency <100ms.
209	
210	### Phase 3 вҖ” Live Simulation Enrichment (Weeks 5-6)
211	
212	Connect `tier3-mcts.ts` to guardian via post-failure trigger in `outcome-orchestrator.ts`.
213	
214	- MCTS results back-propagate via `reward-backprop.ts` to retrain rule thresholds + model.
215	- Still no hard block. Simulation runs async, never on hot path.
216	- Success criteria: failure-class recall improves 15%+ vs Phase 2.
217	
218	### Phase 4 вҖ” SDK Interceptor + Hard Blocking (Weeks 7-8)
219	
220	Ship `sdks/typescript/src/interceptor.ts` + `guardian-gateway.ts` middleware.
221	
222	- Enable BLOCK in mode = auto for high-confidence (`p > 0.85` AND rule-hit).
223	- Customer opt-in flag `guardian_enforcement_enabled`.
224	- Run on shadow traffic first; promote to live after FPR validation.
225	- Success criteria: <2% false-positive rate on shadow traffic; <50ms total latency for fast-path block.
226	
227	### Phase 5 вҖ” Rollback + Audit (Weeks 9-10)
228	
229	Ship `rollback-planner.ts` + `guardian_decisions` audit UI in `layer5/dashboard`.
230	
231	- Auto-rollback sequences for known episode patterns.
232	- Full audit trail with explainability JSON for every decision.
233	- Counterfactual training loop fully closed.
234	- Success criteria: >=1 successful auto-rollback per customer/week; complete explainability for 100% of blocks.
235	
236	---
237	
238	## 7. Risk Analysis
239	
240	| Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
241	|------|--------|------------|
242	| **False positives** | Customer trust erosion; legitimate actions blocked | 3-phase shadow period (weeks 1-6: log-only); per-customer rule sets; mode-gated enforcement (block only in `auto`); auto-degrade to `assist` after 3 consecutive overrides; every block is explainable and appealable |
243	| **Latency regression** | MCP actions slow from ~80ms to ~130ms worst-case | Fast-path budget 10ms; ML 100ms cached; circuit-breaker falls open to "allow + log" if guardian p99 > 200ms; prewarm cache on agent register |
244	| **Guardian misses real bad action** | Bad action executes despite guard | Captured by `log-outcome.ts` post-hoc; becomes negative training row within 24h; async MCTS enrichment adjusts thresholds |
245	| **Rule over-matching** | Pattern blocks legitimate actions | Severity-bumped rules require human review before re-enabling; per-customer rule tuning |
246	| **Customer-side SDK not installed** | IP4 never fires; only advisory IPs active | IP3 (API gateway) provides fallback hard block for HTTP-based actions; IP2 (MCP) covers direct tool use |
247	
248	Target false-positive rate: **<2%**. Alarm threshold: **5%**.
249	
250	---
251	
252	## 8. Stack Reuse (No Rewrite Required)
253	
254	**Reused as-is:**
255	- `lib/scoring.ts` вҖ” feature computation shared with guardian
256	- `lib/policy-engine.ts` вҖ” extended with `BLOCK` variant, remains pure-function
257	- `lib/drift-detector.ts`, `lib/context-embed.ts` вҖ” features into `feature-extractor.ts`
258	- `lib/outcome-score-inference.ts` LRU cache вҖ” same cache, namespaced `guard:`
259	- `lib/simulation/*` вҖ” async enrichment only, unchanged interface
260	- `lib/sequence-tracker.ts`, `fact_episodes` вҖ” drives rollback planner
261	- `middleware/auth.ts`, `middleware/rate-limit.ts` вҖ” protect new `/guardian/*` routes
262	- `agent_trust_scores` (exponential smoothing) вҖ” direct feature into `ml-guard.ts`
263	
264	**New dependencies:**
265	- `aho-corasick` (~30KB) for rule engine
266	- `ml-logistic-regression` lightweight JS implementation, or `onnxruntime-node` for portable model
267	- `scikit-learn` + `pandas` for `train_ml_guard.py` (Python training pipeline already exists)
268	
269	**No new infrastructure:** runs in existing Hono API + MCP server + Supabase Postgres. Training is a cron-able offline job. No new services, no message queue.
270	
271	---
272	
273	## 9. Appendix: Database Schema Changes
274	
275	```sql
276	CREATE TABLE guardian_rules (
277	  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
278	  customer_id uuid REFERENCES dim_customers(customer_id),
279	  pattern_type text CHECK (pattern_type IN ('regex','exact','aho')),
280	  pattern text NOT NULL,
281	  severity smallint NOT NULL CHECK (severity BETWEEN 1 AND 5),
282	  action text CHECK (action IN ('block','warn','rewrite')),
283	  version int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
284	  enabled boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
285	  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
286	  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
287	);
288	
289	CREATE TABLE guardian_decisions (
290	  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
291	  customer_id uuid REFERENCES dim_customers(customer_id),
292	  agent_id uuid,
293	  action_hash text NOT NULL,
294	  decision text NOT NULL CHECK (decision IN ('allow','warn','rewrite','block','escalate')),
295	  latency_ms int,
296	  fast_hit jsonb,
297	  model_prob real,
298	  signals jsonb,
299	  mode text,
300	  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
301	);
302	
303	CREATE TABLE ml_guard_models (
304	  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
305	  customer_id uuid REFERENCES dim_customers(customer_id),
306	  version int NOT NULL,
307	  weights jsonb NOT NULL,
308	  feature_schema jsonb NOT NULL,
309	  deployed_at timestamptz,
310	  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
311	);
312	
313	CREATE INDEX idx_guardian_decisions_customer_created
314	  ON guardian_decisions (customer_id, created_at DESC);
315	
316	-- RLS: tenant-scoped from day 1
317	ALTER TABLE guardian_rules ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
318	ALTER TABLE guardian_decisions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
319	ALTER TABLE ml_guard_models ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
320	```
321	
322	---
323	
324	*End of document. This architecture was synthesized from a 3-agent deep analysis of the LayerInfinite v3.2.0 codebase, external safety pattern research (banking fraud, constrained bandits, neural policy distillation), and direct code audit of interception points.*
325

file.content:
# LayerInfinite вҖ” Proactive Guardian Architecture

**Version:** 1.0.0
**Date:** 2026-05-18
**Status:** Design complete, ready for Phase 1 implementation

---

## 1. Problem Statement

LayerInfinite v3.2.0 RECOMMENDS the best action but cannot PREVENT a bad action from executing.

The current `li_action` MCP tool returns `approved: false` as plain JSON text (`packages/mcp-server/src/tools/li-action.ts:169-181`). The LLM is free to ignore it. The `auto` mode returns `{action: bestAction}` as a suggestion вҖ” not a hard redirect (`li-action.ts:196-209`). The `policy-engine.ts` has `escalate`, `SANDBOX`, `abstain` вҖ” all advisory labels with no enforcement mechanism.

**This architecture upgrades LI from recommendation to enforcement.**

---

## 2. Guiding Principles

1. **Fail-closed, not fail-open.** Uncertain predictions default to BLOCK, not allow.
2. **Multi-layer interception.** Four independent interception points ensure coverage regardless of agent framework.
3. **Mode-gated strictness.** Same `LAYERINFINITE_MODE` env var controls enforcement strictness вҖ” bootstrap customers see zero friction.
4. **Explainable blocks.** Every blocked action returns a machine-readable explanation with signals, weights, and suggested alternatives.
5. **Shadow-then-enforce.** Three phases of log-only deployment before any hard block is activated.
6. **Zero new infrastructure.** Reuses existing Hono API, Supabase Postgres, LightGBM pipeline, and MCP server.

---

## 3. Synthesis of External Patterns

Three patterns were evaluated as the strongest evidence base for this design:

| Pattern | Why It Fits | Evidence |
|---------|-------------|----------|
| **Banking 3-stage cascade** (Stripe Radar, FICO Falcon) | Rules (<2ms) вҶ’ GBDT (<10ms) вҶ’ async review. LI's stack already maps 1:1. | Stripe Radar: 21% fraud reduction at <1% FPR, <50ms p99 |
| **Neural policy distillation** | Train lightweight LightGBM head on `fact_outcomes` to predict P(success \| action, context). Already have the data and model runtime. | DeepMind AlphaGo policy net; ad ranking вҖ” 1-2% AUC loss vs deep model, 100-1000x faster |
| **Constrained contextual bandits** | Wilson lower-bound column in recommendations + delta-risk threshold. Probabilistic safety without changing deterministic core. | LinkedIn feed, Netflix artwork вҖ” 5-20% lift with probabilistic safety guarantees |

Patterns rejected: Constitutional AI (wrong harm model вҖ” LI blocks operational failure, not toxicity), formal verification (not real-time), NeMo Guardrails as-is (adds LLM latency).

---

## 4. Architecture Overview

### 4.1 Four Interception Points

```
                          Agent (LLM + tools)
                               |
        +----------------------+----------------------+
        | INTERCEPTION LAYER   |   (any can trigger) |
        |                      v                      |
        |  [IP1] Prompt-guard    [IP2] MCP li-guardian |
        |  [IP3] API gateway     [IP4] SDK interceptor |
        +----------------------+----------------------+
                               | GuardianRequest
                               v
                  +---------------------------+
                  |      GUARDIAN CORE        |
                  |                           |
                  |  1. FastRulePath   <10ms  |
                  |       v no-hit            |
                  |  2. MLGuard       <100ms  |
                  |       v uncertain         |
                  |  3. PolicyEngine  <1ms    |
                  |       v                   |
                  |  4. ConfidenceGate        |
                  |     fail-closed -> BLOCK  |
                  +-----------+---------------+
                              | Decision
              +-------+-------+-------+-------+
              v       v       v       v       v
            ALLOW   WARN   REWRITE  BLOCK  ESCALATE
              |       |       |       |       |
              +-------+-------+-------+-------+
                              v
                   audit_trail + outcome_log
                              |
              +---------------+---------------+
              v                               v
       ASYNC MCTS enrichment        Counterfactual training
       (>5s, non-blocking)          (blocks become negative rows)
```

| IP | When It Fires | Location | Enforcement Strength |
|----|--------------|----------|---------------------|
| **IP1: Prompt-guard** | During LLM reasoning, before tool selection | MCP tool `li-guardian` + customer-side prompt middleware | Advisory вҖ” LLM may ignore |
| **IP2: MCP `li-guardian`** | At `li_action` tool call | `packages/mcp-server/src/tools/li-guardian.ts` | Advisory вҖ” returns block signal as text |
| **IP3: API gateway** | Outbound HTTP from agent framework | `layer5/api/middleware/guardian-gateway.ts` | Hard вҖ” intercepts before request leaves agent infra |
| **IP4: SDK interceptor** | Within agent's runtime | `layer5/sdks/typescript/src/interceptor.ts` | **Hard** вҖ” monkey-patches tool dispatcher, throws before execution |

**Critical insight:** Only IP4 can truly hard-block. The others return advisory signals that the agent framework must honor. LI ships a thin interceptor that the customer wraps around their tool executor. If guardian says `blocked: true`, the interceptor throws before the action reaches the backend.

### 4.2 Decision Pipeline (<200ms p99)

| Stage | What It Does | Latency | Short-Circuit |
|-------|-------------|---------|---------------|
| **Fast rules** | Aho-corasick + regex on action name, params, headers. Patterns: shell injection, secret leakage, destructive verbs, prod-resource match. Per-customer compiled ruleset. | <10ms | BLOCK immediately on match |
| **ML guard** | Logistic regression predicting failure probability from 24 features (trust score, drift, context match, recency, semantic cluster). Weights loaded from `ml_guard_models` table. | <100ms (cached) | BLOCK if p(fail) > 0.85 |
| **Policy engine** | Existing decision tree extended with guardian signals. Remains pure-function. | <1ms | ESCALATE if uncertain |
| **Confidence gate** | Fail-closed: if \|p - 0.5\| < margin AND mode in {assist, auto}, BLOCK by default | <1ms | Never allows uncertain predictions |

### 4.3 Fail-Closed Design

If the ML model is uncertain (`|p - 0.5| < 0.2`), the default is **BLOCK** вҖ” not allow.

When blocking, the response includes:
```json
{
  "blocked": true,
  "reason": "predicted_failure_probability=0.94",
  "signals": [
    {"source": "regex", "pattern": "#credential-leak", "weight": 0.4},
    {"source": "model", "feature": "trust_score", "value": 0.12, "weight": 0.35},
    {"source": "drift", "feature": "context_mismatch", "value": true, "weight": 0.25}
  ],
  "suggested_action": "escalate_to_human"
}
```

### 4.4 Mode-Aware Strictness

Same `LAYERINFINITE_MODE` env var controls guardian strictness:

| Mode | Guardian Behavior |
|------|-------------------|
| `bootstrap` | Log only вҖ” guardian evaluates but never blocks. Builds training data silently. |
| `recommend` | Warn + return `suggested_action` вҖ” no enforcement |
| `assist` | Suggest + escalate on high-risk вҖ” soft enforcement (returns `human_review_required: true`) |
| `auto` | **BLOCK if predicted failure > threshold** вҖ” hard enforcement via SDK interceptor |

---

## 5. File-Level Implementation Plan

### 5.1 New Files

**Guardian core module: `layer5/api/lib/guardian/`**

| File | Responsibility | Lines (est) |
|------|---------------|-------------|
| `index.ts` | `evaluate(req: GuardianRequest): Promise<GuardianDecision>` вҖ” orchestrator. Sequences FastвҶ’MLвҶ’Confidence, short-circuits on high-confidence block. | 80 |
| `rule-engine.ts` | Compiled `RuleSet` per `customer_id`. Aho-corasick + regex against action params/command. Hot-reload from `guardian_rules` table. | 120 |
| `ml-guard.ts` | `predictFailureProb(features): number`. Logistic regression weights loaded at boot; features from existing `scoring.ts` + `drift-detector.ts` + trust. Cache via existing LRU. | 90 |
| `confidence-gate.ts` | If \|p - 0.5\| < margin and mode enforceable вҶ’ BLOCK with `reason="low_confidence"`. | 30 |
| `explainer.ts` | Builds explainability JSON. Each signal carries `source` (regex\|model\|drift\|trust\|policy) + `weight`. | 60 |
| `rollback-planner.ts` | Consumes `fact_episodes` + `action_sequences`; returns inverse-action sequence for known episodes. | 80 |
| `feature-extractor.ts` | Maps `GuardianRequest` вҶ’ 24-dim feature vector. Reuses `context-embed.ts`, `drift-detector.ts`, trust score. | 70 |
| `types.ts` | `GuardianRequest`, `GuardianDecision`, `Signal`, `RuleHit`, `Mode`. | 40 |

**New routes and tools:**

| File | Responsibility |
|------|---------------|
| `layer5/api/routes/guardian-evaluate.ts` | `POST /v1/guardian/evaluate` вҖ” thin wrapper over `lib/guardian/index.ts`. Auth via existing `middleware/auth.ts`. |
| `layer5/api/middleware/guardian-gateway.ts` | Reverse-proxy interception (IP3). Wraps outbound `fetch`; calls guardian before forwarding. |
| `packages/mcp-server/src/tools/li-guardian.ts` | MCP tool exposing `evaluate` for IP1/IP2. Registered in all modes. |
| `layer5/training/train_ml_guard.py` | Trains logistic regression from `fact_outcomes` (label = `success=false OR rolled_back=true`). Exports `ml_guard_weights.json`. |

**Migration:**

| File | Responsibility |
|------|---------------|
| `layer5/supabase/migrations/2026_guardian_schema.sql` | `guardian_rules`, `guardian_decisions`, `ml_guard_models` tables. RLS tenant-scoped from day 1 (fixes existing RLS leaks by being correct here). |

### 5.2 Changed Files

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `packages/mcp-server/src/tools/li-action.ts` | Call guardian first. On BLOCK, return safe-fallback path via existing `li-fallback.ts`. On REWRITE, return modified params. |
| `packages/mcp-server/src/config.ts` | Consider adding `enforce` to `LIMode` type if a distinct hard-block mode is desired alongside `auto`. |
| `layer5/api/lib/policy-engine.ts` | Extend `PolicyDecision` with `BLOCK` variant (distinct from `escalate`/`SANDBOX`/`abstain`). Accept guardian signals as additional input. |
| `layer5/api/lib/scoring.ts` | Emit features to `feature-extractor.ts` (shared computation, no duplication). |
| `layer5/api/lib/outcome-orchestrator.ts` | Write `guardian_decisions` row on every evaluation. Emit counterfactual training rows on BLOCK events. |
| `layer5/api/routes/log-outcome.ts` | When `success=false`, trigger async MCTS enrichment job via `lib/simulation/tier3-mcts.ts`. |
| `layer5/api/lib/simulation/tier-selector.ts` | Add `triggerReason: 'guardian_async_enrich'` path; runs out-of-band, never blocks. |
| `layer5/sdks/typescript/src/interceptor.ts` | NEW in SDK вҖ” monkey-patches `globalThis.fetch`, `pg.Client.query`, `child_process.exec`. Pre-call вҶ’ `client.guardian.evaluate()`. |
| `layer5/sdks/typescript/src/client.ts` | Add `guardian.evaluate()` + `guardian.streamDecisions()` methods. |

---

## 6. Phased Migration (10 Weeks)

### Phase 0 вҖ” Security Blockers (Before Any Enforcement)

Before Phase 4 turns on hard blocking, fix these critical security issues from the v3.2.0 audit:

- Fix unauthenticated webhook (`routes/webhook.ts`)
- Fix RLS leaks (`dim_contexts`, `dim_actions`, `dim_institutional_knowledge`, `world_model_artifacts`)
- Fix timing-unsafe secret comparison (`api/index.ts`)

### Phase 1 вҖ” Fast-Path Rules (Weeks 1-2)

Ship `rule-engine.ts` + `guardian_rules` table + `POST /v1/guardian/evaluate` + MCP `li-guardian` tool.

- Mode = bootstrap: log only, never block.
- Seed 30 curated patterns (shell injection, secret regexes, prod-resource names, destructive verbs).
- Success criteria: p95 evaluate latency <10ms; 100% of MCP actions logged through guardian.

### Phase 2 вҖ” ML Guard (Weeks 3-4)

Train logistic regression on 30 days of `fact_outcomes`; deploy weights via `ml_guard_models`.

- Wire into evaluator behind rules.
- Mode = recommend: warn + return `suggested_action`.
- Reuse existing score-cache (LRU Map, 1000 entries, 5-min TTL).
- Success criteria: offline AUC > 0.80; p95 ML latency <100ms.

### Phase 3 вҖ” Live Simulation Enrichment (Weeks 5-6)

Connect `tier3-mcts.ts` to guardian via post-failure trigger in `outcome-orchestrator.ts`.

- MCTS results back-propagate via `reward-backprop.ts` to retrain rule thresholds + model.
- Still no hard block. Simulation runs async, never on hot path.
- Success criteria: failure-class recall improves 15%+ vs Phase 2.

### Phase 4 вҖ” SDK Interceptor + Hard Blocking (Weeks 7-8)

Ship `sdks/typescript/src/interceptor.ts` + `guardian-gateway.ts` middleware.

- Enable BLOCK in mode = auto for high-confidence (`p > 0.85` AND rule-hit).
- Customer opt-in flag `guardian_enforcement_enabled`.
- Run on shadow traffic first; promote to live after FPR validation.
- Success criteria: <2% false-positive rate on shadow traffic; <50ms total latency for fast-path block.

### Phase 5 вҖ” Rollback + Audit (Weeks 9-10)

Ship `rollback-planner.ts` + `guardian_decisions` audit UI in `layer5/dashboard`.

- Auto-rollback sequences for known episode patterns.
- Full audit trail with explainability JSON for every decision.
- Counterfactual training loop fully closed.
- Success criteria: >=1 successful auto-rollback per customer/week; complete explainability for 100% of blocks.

---

## 7. Risk Analysis

| Risk | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|--------|------------|
| **False positives** | Customer trust erosion; legitimate actions blocked | 3-phase shadow period (weeks 1-6: log-only); per-customer rule sets; mode-gated enforcement (block only in `auto`); auto-degrade to `assist` after 3 consecutive overrides; every block is explainable and appealable |
| **Latency regression** | MCP actions slow from ~80ms to ~130ms worst-case | Fast-path budget 10ms; ML 100ms cached; circuit-breaker falls open to "allow + log" if guardian p99 > 200ms; prewarm cache on agent register |
| **Guardian misses real bad action** | Bad action executes despite guard | Captured by `log-outcome.ts` post-hoc; becomes negative training row within 24h; async MCTS enrichment adjusts thresholds |
| **Rule over-matching** | Pattern blocks legitimate actions | Severity-bumped rules require human review before re-enabling; per-customer rule tuning |
| **Customer-side SDK not installed** | IP4 never fires; only advisory IPs active | IP3 (API gateway) provides fallback hard block for HTTP-based actions; IP2 (MCP) covers direct tool use |

Target false-positive rate: **<2%**. Alarm threshold: **5%**.

---

## 8. Stack Reuse (No Rewrite Required)

**Reused as-is:**
- `lib/scoring.ts` вҖ” feature computation shared with guardian
- `lib/policy-engine.ts` вҖ” extended with `BLOCK` variant, remains pure-function
- `lib/drift-detector.ts`, `lib/context-embed.ts` вҖ” features into `feature-extractor.ts`
- `lib/outcome-score-inference.ts` LRU cache вҖ” same cache, namespaced `guard:`
- `lib/simulation/*` вҖ” async enrichment only, unchanged interface
- `lib/sequence-tracker.ts`, `fact_episodes` вҖ” drives rollback planner
- `middleware/auth.ts`, `middleware/rate-limit.ts` вҖ” protect new `/guardian/*` routes
- `agent_trust_scores` (exponential smoothing) вҖ” direct feature into `ml-guard.ts`

**New dependencies:**
- `aho-corasick` (~30KB) for rule engine
- `ml-logistic-regression` lightweight JS implementation, or `onnxruntime-node` for portable model
- `scikit-learn` + `pandas` for `train_ml_guard.py` (Python training pipeline already exists)

**No new infrastructure:** runs in existing Hono API + MCP server + Supabase Postgres. Training is a cron-able offline job. No new services, no message queue.

---

## 9. Appendix: Database Schema Changes

```sql
CREATE TABLE guardian_rules (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  customer_id uuid REFERENCES dim_customers(customer_id),
  pattern_type text CHECK (pattern_type IN ('regex','exact','aho')),
  pattern text NOT NULL,
  severity smallint NOT NULL CHECK (severity BETWEEN 1 AND 5),
  action text CHECK (action IN ('block','warn','rewrite')),
  version int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  enabled boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE guardian_decisions (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  customer_id uuid REFERENCES dim_customers(customer_id),
  agent_id uuid,
  action_hash text NOT NULL,
  decision text NOT NULL CHECK (decision IN ('allow','warn','rewrite','block','escalate')),
  latency_ms int,
  fast_hit jsonb,
  model_prob real,
  signals jsonb,
  mode text,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE ml_guard_models (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  customer_id uuid REFERENCES dim_customers(customer_id),
  version int NOT NULL,
  weights jsonb NOT NULL,
  feature_schema jsonb NOT NULL,
  deployed_at timestamptz,
  created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_guardian_decisions_customer_created
  ON guardian_decisions (customer_id, created_at DESC);

-- RLS: tenant-scoped from day 1
ALTER TABLE guardian_rules ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE guardian_decisions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE ml_guard_models ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
```

---

*End of document. This architecture was synthesized from a 3-agent deep analysis of the LayerInfinite v3.2.0 codebase, external safety pattern research (banking fraud, constrained bandits, neural policy distillation), and direct code audit of interception points.*
